title: Flaky Jamaican Butternut Squash Pasta
description: A romantic Jamaican dish featuring butternut squash and a low-calorie friendly pasta water emulsion, with an earthy and flaky texture.
instructions: Toss the butternut squash with 1 tbsp of olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the butternut squash in the oven for 30 minutes, or until tender.
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions, reserving 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the jamaican jerk seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted butternut squash, cooked pasta, and reserved pasta water to the skillet.
Toss everything together, adding the grated parmesan cheese and seasoning with salt and black pepper to taste.
